case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. BENJAMIN HILL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, BENJAMIN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 491 31ST AVE. #218, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, BENJAMIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, BENJAMIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, BENJAMIN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, BENJAMIN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, BENJAMIN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED FEB-19-2010, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
